See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 38328 => 'Mitrovicë', 383280 => 'Gjilan', 38329 => 'Prizren', 383290 => 'Ferizaj', 38338 => 'Prishtinë', 38339 => 'Pejë', 383390 => 'Gjakovë', ];
